title: aspalathus volvularis
intro: Aspalathus volvularis, also known as Rooibos, is a perennial plant native to the Cederberg region of South Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antioxidants, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Rooibos include its ability to soothe digestive issues, boost the immune system, and aid in reducing stress and anxiety. Rooibos is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, as well as used in supplement form, and is also used to make a popular South African caffeine-free hot beverage.
